pages.title: Pack a Medkit
pages.text: This one is emergency tack. Wrap it up with wool, healing supplies, and a proper regeneration potion before you head into dangerous country.

pages.title: Last-Second Rescue
pages.text: If incoming damage would shove your horse below half health, the medkit is consumed and grants $(thing)Regeneration$(), $(thing)Instant Health$(), $(thing)Resistance$(), and $(thing)Fire Resistance$(). It is the difference between a close call and a funeral.
